deck_plans.ship_map_pdf_caveat: PDF predates the February-April 2026 Palumbo Malta refit and does not yet show the MSC Yacht Club, Butcher's Cut, or the redesigned spa layout.

stats_fallback.christened: 2008-04-05 (Port of Dover, Kent, England — first MSC ship named outside Italy; godmother Sophia Loren)
stats_fallback.cabins_note: 1,343 post-April-2026 refit (approximately 1,275 pre-refit; +69 new Yacht Club suites = ~1,344).
stats_fallback.builder: Aker Yards (now Chantiers de l'Atlantique), Saint-Nazaire
stats_fallback.builder_note: Aker Yards is period-accurate for April 2008 delivery; STX Europe's acquisition of Aker Yards did not close until October 2008.
stats_fallback.yacht_club_status: Installed February-April 2026 at Palumbo Malta Shipyard (Valletta). 69 suites across five categories (Yacht Club Interior, Deluxe, Grand, Executive Family, Whirlpool Royal); private Top Sail Lounge, Yacht Club Restaurant, sundeck with pool; 24-hour butler service.

related.class_notes: Musica Class. MSC Poesia is the third of four. Each sister uses unique MDR and theatre names — Poesia's are Le Fontane Restaurant, Il Palladio Ristorante, and the Teatro Carlo Felice (named after the historic opera house in Genoa).

deployment.feb_apr_2026_refit: Palumbo Malta Shipyard, Valletta, 19 February - 6 April 2026 (~6 weeks). Added new MSC Yacht Club enclave (69 suites), Butcher's Cut steakhouse, renewed Kaito Sushi Bar, redesigned MSC Aurea Spa with Gentleman's Barber and expanded Outdoor Aurea.
deployment.apr_2026_repositioning: Transatlantic crossing from Civitavecchia to Miami, April 6, 2026 onward. Current AIS position April 10, 2026 21:56 UTC: Strait of Gibraltar, en route to Funchal, Portugal (ETA April 12).
deployment.spring_2026: Panama Canal cruise from Miami en route to Seattle.
deployment.summer_2026: Seattle — 7-night roundtrip Alaska itineraries (Tracy Arm Fjord, Inside Passage, Ketchikan, Icy Strait Point, Juneau, Victoria BC). MSC's Alaska debut. May through September 2026.
deployment.winter_2026_27: Miami — roundtrip Caribbean and Central America itineraries.

history.christened: 5 April 2008, Port of Dover, Kent, England (Sophia Loren) — first MSC ship christened outside Italy
history.2026_refit: 19 February - 6 April 2026 at Palumbo Malta Shipyard, Valletta. Per MSC official press release: new MSC Yacht Club enclave with 69 suites, Top Sail Lounge, dedicated Yacht Club Restaurant, private sundeck with pool and 24-hour butler service; new Butcher's Cut steakhouse; renewed Kaito Sushi Bar; redesigned MSC Aurea Spa with Gentleman's Barber, workout studios, expanded Outdoor Aurea area; Top 16 → Top 15 Exclusive Solarium rebrand; new Technogym equipment.
history.discrepancies_flagged: Early news outlets (Travel Weekly, Cruise Industry News) reported 62 new Yacht Club suites; the official MSC press release and CruiseMapper ship page state 69. Use MSC's authoritative figure of 69. Cabin count: 1,275 (pre-refit, CruiseDeckPlans) vs 1,343 (post-refit, CruiseMapper). Builder name: Wikipedia lists Aker Yards (period-accurate); CruiseMapper lists Chantiers de l'Atlantique / STX France (anachronistic for 2008).
